announcement-bar.description: Top banner with dismissible message and optional CTA link

props.link: { label: string, href: string } - Optional CTA link
props.dismissible: boolean - Whether user can close the banner (default: false)

navbar.description: Main navigation bar with logo (text or image), links, and call-to-action button

props.logoUrl: string - Logo image URL (optional, use placehold.co with brand initials if no real logo)
props.links: array<{ label: string, href: string }> - Navigation links (default: [])
props.cta: { label: string, href: string } - Call-to-action button

props.label: string - Trigger button text
props.items: array<{ label: string, href: string }> - Dropdown menu items (default: [])

mega-menu.description: Multi-column flyout navigation panel with grouped links

props.columns: array<{ title: string, items: array<{ label: string, href: string }> }> - Menu columns with titled link groups (default: [])

sticky-header.description: Fixed navigation header that sticks on scroll with logo, links, and CTA

props.logo: string - Brand name or logo text
props.links: array<{ label: string, href: string }> - Navigation links (default: [])
props.cta: { label: string, href: string } - Call-to-action button

search-bar.description: Search input field with submit button and configurable placeholder

props.onSearch: function - Callback invoked with query string on submit

login-button.description: Styled link button for user login with icon

register-button.description: Styled link button for user registration with icon

user-avatar-menu.description: User avatar with click-toggled dropdown menu showing user name and links

props.name: string - User display name
props.avatar: string - URL for the user's avatar image
props.menuItems: array<{ label: string, href: string }> - Dropdown menu links (default: [])

notification-icon.description: Bell icon button with unread notification count badge

language-selector.description: Dropdown selector for switching between available languages

props.languages: array<{ code: string, label: string }> - Available language options (default: [])

hero.description: Text+icon hero section with gradient background. Use for simple, clean designs without media. Best for service/professional sites.

props.title: string - Main heading text
props.subtitle: string - Supporting description text
props.eyebrow: string - Small uppercase text above title (optional, e.g. 'Welcome to')
props.icon: string - SVG icon markup displayed above the title (optional, e.g. '<svg>...</svg>')

hero-video.description: Full-width hero with autoplay background video, dark overlay, and white text. Best for immersive/premium sites.

props.title: string - Main heading text
props.subtitle: string - Supporting description text
props.videoUrl: string - URL of the background video (use stock Pixabay URLs)
props.eyebrow: string - Small uppercase text above title (optional)

hero-image.description: Full-width hero with background image, dark overlay, and white text. Best for showcasing a specific photo or product.

props.title: string - Main heading text
props.subtitle: string - Supporting description text
props.imageUrl: string - URL of the background image
props.eyebrow: string - Small uppercase text above title (optional)

hero-stats.description: Row of key metric statistics with values and labels

props.stats: array<{ value: string, label: string }> - Statistics to display

trust-badges.description: Row of partner/trust logos with optional section title

props.title: string - Section heading text
props.logos: array<{ src: string, alt: string }> - Badge/logo images

scroll-indicator.description: Animated scroll-down arrow that links to a target section

props.targetId: string - ID of the target section to scroll to

section-title.description: Reusable section header with eyebrow, heading, and subtitle

props.eyebrow: string - Small label text above the title
props.title: string - Main heading text
props.subtitle: string - Supporting description text

content-card.description: Card with image, title, description, and read-more link

props.title: string - Card heading text
props.link: { label: string, href: string } - Read-more link

featured-content.description: Side-by-side image and text section with optional reverse layout

props.title: string - Content heading text
props.reverse: boolean - Whether to flip image and text order

about-section.description: About section with image, description text, and optional stats row

props.title: string - Section heading text
props.stats: array<{ value: string, label: string }> - Key statistics

services-section.description: Grid of clickable service cards with icons, images, titles, descriptions, and links

props.title: string - Section heading text
props.services: array<{ icon: string, title: string, description: string, image: string (optional thumbnail), href: string (link target) }> - Service items

features.description: Feature grid with icons, titles, and descriptions. Supports simple string list or rich objects.

props.title: string - Section heading text
props.items: array<{ icon: string, title: string, description: string }> - Rich feature cards with icons (preferred), OR array<string> for simple bullet list

product-grid.description: Grid of clickable product cards with images, names, prices, descriptions, and links

props.title: string - Section heading text
props.products: array<{ image: string, name: string, price: string, description: string, href: string }> - Product items (each card is clickable)

category-showcase.description: Linked category cards with background images and overlay names

props.title: string - Section heading text
props.categories: array<{ name: string, image: string, href: string }> - Category items

tag-cloud.description: Collection of tag pills displayed in a flowing layout

related-content.description: Grid of linked content cards with images and titles

props.title: string - Section heading text
props.items: array<{ title: string, image: string, href: string }> - Related content items

author-profile.description: Author bio card with avatar, name, bio text, and social links

props.name: string - Author display name
props.socialLinks: array<{ platform: string, href: string }> - Social media links

gallery.description: Image gallery grid with title and alt-text support

props.title: string - Gallery heading text
props.images: array<{ src: string, alt: string }> - Gallery images (default: [])

carousel.description: Image carousel with prev/next buttons, captions, and dot indicators

props.items: array<{ image: string, caption: string }> - Carousel slides

lightbox.description: Thumbnail grid that opens a full-screen image viewer with navigation

props.images: array<{ src: string, alt: string }> - Images for the lightbox

video-player.description: HTML5 video player with poster image and optional title

embedded-media.description: Responsive iframe embed for external media like YouTube or Vimeo

props.url: string - Embed URL for the iframe
props.title: string - Descriptive title for the embed

audio-player.description: HTML5 audio player with optional title

before-after-comparison.description: Interactive slider comparing two images side by side

props.before: { src: string, label: string } - Before image with label
props.after: { src: string, label: string } - After image with label

contact.description: Simple contact section with title, description, email, phone, and button

contact-form.description: Dynamic contact form with configurable fields and submit button

props.title: string - Form heading text
props.fields: array<{ name: string, type: string, placeholder: string, required: boolean }> - Form field definitions (default: [])

newsletter-form.description: Email subscription form with title, description, and success message

props.title: string - Form heading text
props.description: string - Descriptive text above the input
props.placeholder: string - Email input placeholder (default: 'Enter your email')

quick-inquiry-form.description: Compact inquiry form with configurable text fields

props.title: string - Form heading text
props.fields: array<{ name: string, placeholder: string }> - Input field definitions (default: [])

file-upload-form.description: Drag-and-drop file upload form with type and size validation

props.title: string - Form heading text
props.maxSizeMb: number - Maximum file size in megabytes (default: 10)

live-chat-widget.description: Floating live-chat bubble that opens a message panel with online status

props.title: string - Chat panel heading (default: 'Live Chat')
props.subtitle: string - Chat panel subheading (default: 'We're here to help')
props.online: boolean - Whether support is currently online (default: true)

chatbot-assistant.description: Conversational chatbot UI with message history and text input

props.name: string - Bot display name (default: 'Bot')
props.welcomeMessage: string - Initial greeting message (default: 'Hello! How can I help you today?')

feedback-form.description: Feedback form with radio options and optional comment textarea

props.title: string - Form heading text
props.options: array<{ value: string, label: string }> - Feedback radio options (default: [])

rating-widget.description: Interactive star rating widget with hover preview

review-form.description: Review submission form with optional star rating and text area

props.title: string - Form heading text
props.ratingEnabled: boolean - Whether to show the star rating input (default: true)

comment-section.description: Comment thread with existing comments list and new comment form

props.title: string - Section heading text
props.comments: array<{ author: string, text: string, date: string }> - Existing comments (default: [])

advanced-search.description: Search bar with expandable filter panel for multi-criteria search

props.title: string - Section heading text
props.filters: array<{ name: string, type: string, options: array<string> }> - Filter field definitions (default: [])

search-results.description: Search results list displaying query, total count, and linked result items

props.results: array<{ title: string, description: string, href: string }> - Result items (default: [])
props.total: number - Total number of results (overrides results.length)

filters-sidebar.description: Collapsible sidebar with grouped checkbox filters

props.title: string - Sidebar heading text
props.groups: array<{ name: string, options: array<string> }> - Filter groups with options (default: [])

sort-controls.description: Sort-by dropdown and button group for ordering results

props.options: array<{ value: string, label: string }> - Sort options (default: [])

price-filter.description: Dual-range slider for filtering by price range

tag-filters.description: Toggleable tag pill buttons for multi-select tag filtering

category-filters.description: Vertical list of category buttons with optional item counts

props.categories: array<{ name: string, count: number }> - Category items with counts (default: [])

clear-filter-button.description: Button to reset all active filters

props.label: string - Button label text (default: 'Clear All Filters')
props.onClick: function - Callback invoked when button is clicked

pricing.description: Pricing cards grid with plan names, prices, and descriptions

props.title: string - Section heading text
props.plans: array<{ name: string, price: string, description: string }> - Pricing plans (default: [])

product-card.description: Product card with image, name, price, original price, badge, and optional link

product-detail.description: Full product detail page with gallery, name, price, description, specs, and stock status

props.name: string - Product name
props.specs: array<{ label: string, value: string }> - Specification rows (default: [])
props.inStock: boolean - Whether the product is in stock

add-to-cart-button.description: Add-to-cart button with cart icon and disabled state

props.label: string - Button label text (default: 'Add to Cart')
props.disabled: boolean - Whether the button is disabled (default: false)

wishlist-button.description: Toggle button with heart icon for adding/removing from wishlist

props.active: boolean - Whether the item is wishlisted (default: false)
props.label: string - Button label text (default: 'Wishlist')

compare-button.description: Toggle button for adding/removing a product from comparison

props.label: string - Button label text (default: 'Compare')
props.active: boolean - Whether compare mode is active (default: false)

product-gallery.description: Product image gallery with main image and clickable thumbnails

props.images: array<{ src: string, alt: string }> - Product images (default: [])

product-specs-table.description: Striped table displaying product specification label-value pairs

props.title: string - Table heading text (default: 'Specifications')
props.specs: array<{ label: string, value: string }> - Specification rows (default: [])

stock-indicator.description: Colored dot indicator showing in-stock/out-of-stock status with quantity

props.inStock: boolean - Whether the product is in stock (default: false)
props.quantity: number - Available quantity (shown when in stock)

price-display.description: Formatted price display with optional original price, currency, and billing period

discount-badge.description: Small badge label for promotions like sale, new, or clearance

user-dashboard.description: User dashboard with greeting, stat cards, and recent activity list

props.stats: array<{ value: string, label: string }> - Dashboard stat cards (default: [])
props.recentActivity: array<{ action: string, date: string }> - Recent activity items (default: [])

profile-page.description: User profile page with avatar, name, email, bio, and member-since date

edit-profile-form.description: Editable profile form with dynamic field definitions and submit button

props.fields: array<{ name: string, label: string, type: string, value: string }> - Form field definitions (default: [])

order-history.description: Table of past orders showing ID, date, items, total, and status

props.title: string - Section heading text (default: 'Order History')
props.orders: array<{ id: string, date: string, items: array<string>|string, total: string, status: string }> - Order records (default: [])

saved-items.description: Grid of saved/bookmarked items with images, names, prices, and links

props.title: string - Section heading text (default: 'Saved Items')
props.items: array<{ name: string, image: string, price: string, href: string }> - Saved items (default: [])

notifications-center.description: Notification list with unread badge, message text, and dates

props.title: string - Section heading text (default: 'Notifications')
props.notifications: array<{ message: string, date: string, read: boolean }> - Notification items (default: [])

messages-inbox.description: Message inbox list with sender, subject, date, preview, and read status

props.title: string - Section heading text (default: 'Inbox')
props.messages: array<{ from: string, subject: string, date: string, preview: string, read: boolean }> - Message items (default: [])

activity-timeline.description: Vertical timeline showing user activity events with dates and descriptions

props.title: string - Section heading text (default: 'Activity')
props.events: array<{ action: string, date: string, description: string }> - Timeline events (default: [])

testimonials.description: Grid of customer testimonial cards with quotes, author photos, roles, and star ratings

props.title: string - Section heading text
props.testimonials: array<{ quote: string, name: string, avatar: string (placehold.co URL with initials), role: string (job title/company), rating: number (1-5 stars) }> - Testimonial items (default: [])

case-studies.description: Grid of case study cards with images, client names, titles, and descriptions

props.title: string - Section heading text
props.studies: array<{ title: string, client: string, description: string, image: string, href: string }> - Case study items (default: [])

client-logos.description: Grayscale logo row showcasing clients or partners

props.title: string - Section heading text
props.logos: array<{ src: string, alt: string }> - Client logo images (default: [])

pricing-table.description: Pricing plan cards with features, clickable CTA buttons, and highlighted plan support

props.title: string - Section heading text
props.plans: array<{ name: string, price: string, period: string, features: array<string>, cta: string, ctaHref: string (link target, e.g. '#contact'), badge: string (optional, e.g. 'Most Popular'), highlighted: boolean }> - Plan definitions (default: [])

feature-comparison.description: Feature comparison table with plan columns and check/cross values

props.title: string - Section heading text
props.plans: array<{ name: string, values: array<boolean|string> }> - Plan columns with per-feature values (default: [])

faq-accordion.description: Accordion of frequently asked questions with expand/collapse toggle

props.title: string - Section heading text
props.items: array<{ question: string, answer: string }> - FAQ entries (default: [])

certifications-badges.description: Grid of certification or accreditation badge images with labels

props.title: string - Section heading text
props.badges: array<{ src: string, alt: string, label: string }> - Badge items (default: [])

breadcrumbs.description: Breadcrumb navigation trail with linked items and current page indicator

props.items: array<{ label: string, href: string }> - Breadcrumb trail items (default: [])

pagination.description: Page navigation with previous/next buttons and numbered page buttons

props.onPageChange: function - Callback invoked with the selected page number

back-to-top.description: Fixed-position button that smooth-scrolls back to the top of the page

props.label: string - Button label/aria-label text (default: 'Back to top')

cookie-consent.description: Fixed bottom banner for cookie consent with accept/decline buttons and privacy link

loading-spinner.description: Animated circular loading spinner with configurable size and label

props.label: string - Loading label text displayed below the spinner

empty-state.description: Placeholder UI for empty content areas with icon, message, and action link

props.icon: string - Icon or emoji displayed above the title
props.title: string - Empty state heading text

error-message.description: Error alert with title, description, and optional retry button

props.title: string - Error heading text
props.onRetry: function - Callback invoked when retry button is clicked

maintenance-notice.description: Full-page maintenance notice with title, message, and estimated time

props.title: string - Notice heading text (default: 'Under Maintenance')
props.estimatedTime: string - Estimated time until service is restored

footer.description: Simple footer with text and a row of navigation links

props.links: array<{ label: string, href: string }> - Footer navigation links (default: [])

social-media-icons.description: Row of social media icon links for platforms like Twitter, Facebook, etc.

props.links: array<{ platform: string, href: string }> - Social platform links (default: [])

footer-newsletter.description: Footer-embedded newsletter signup form with title and description

props.title: string - Form heading text
props.description: string - Descriptive text above the input
props.placeholder: string - Email input placeholder (default: 'Enter your email')

contact-details-block.description: Contact information block with address, phone, email, and business hours

map-embed.description: Responsive iframe map embed with configurable height

props.embedUrl: string - Google Maps or map embed URL
props.title: string - Iframe title for accessibility (default: 'Map')

legal-links.description: Inline list of legal page links separated by dividers

props.links: array<{ label: string, href: string }> - Legal page links (default: [])

copyright-notice.description: Copyright text line with year and company/owner name

props.year: number|string - Copyright year (defaults to current year)
